THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERSTUDY.title: The Understudy
THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERSTUDY.description:
A failed student with artistic delusions.
Uses plans and inner turmoil to win over audience.
THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERSTUDY.goldMonolog: [sine]Enough for ink and manuscript... the masterpiece that will make him take it back...[/sine]
THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERSTUDY.eventDeathP: Not yet... he still hasn't heard my masterpiece.
THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERSTUDY.aromaPrinci: [sine][gold]One masterpiece... and he will finally see he was wrong about me.[/gold][/sine]
THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERSTUDY.bestiaryQuo: I have yet to move this one.
THEUNDERSTUDY-THE_UNDERSTUDY.cardsModifi: Understudy cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
